header.headline: Bump Allocator Memory Layout
header.subtitle: Typed regions stay ordered inside one quantized arena

headers.title: Tensor Headers
headers.caption: Small descriptors track type, shape, strides, and data pointer targets

q4k_weights.title: Quantized Weights (Q4_K)
q4k_weights.caption: Read-only packed blocks keep scales and codes contiguous inside one region

bf16_cache.title: Dequantized Cache (BF16)
bf16_cache.caption: Hot layers can be expanded into a faster cache without changing the arena order

activations.title: Activations (FP32)
activations.caption: Batch x sequence x embed buffers stay FP32 to preserve quality and avoid recalibration

scratch.title: Scratch Space
scratch.caption: Attention scores, intermediate MLP values, and softmax scratch reuse one region

key_principles.title: Key Principles
items: Never mix types in the same region
Activations stay FP32 for stable quality
Scratch space reuses a single watermark
